form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Toscano Girl at this track over 1609m on April 1 at $2.50. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind April Duford at this track over 1609m on April 8 at $7.50. Perfectly placed to win.
